programme.desc: There's a food shortage at Corner Gas, causing a panic in Dog River; Lacey takes advantage of the situation by offering locals "exotic" recipes at The Ruby.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: A bus full of kids crashes and sends the team racing; Bash's life is upended when he is reunited with a woman from his past; with Dr. Bishop still unconscious after his stroke, Mags struggles to find support in her mentor's absence.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries
programme.desc: Emma is hired to consult on the acquisition of a castle-like estate that local legends claim carries a curse.

programme.title: Riddled With Deceit: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: Former Detective Jeff Jackson teams up with Dr. Zee Madeiras to track down their friend's missing emerald brooch, a thief and a murderer.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: A Chocolate Chip Cookie Mystery
programme.desc: A baker in small-town Minnesota turns amateur sleuth after finding her friend and delivery driver shot to death behind her shop.

programme.title: Born Hungry
programme.desc: Following the story of a runaway child from the streets of India who is adopted by a family and becomes one of the top chefs in the world.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.desc: Aurora's boyfriend, Martin, reconnects with his long-lost niece, but she departs suddenly, leaving a dead husband on a balcony and a baby in a bathtub.

programme.title: We Three Kings
programme.desc: A retired musician hatches a plan to bring his three daughters home for Christmas for the first time since their mother's death. Holiday songs and old memories soon make the estranged siblings realize that life is better when they're all together.

programme.title: Christmas Unfiltered
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Becky wishes that her family would truly hear her. All of her thoughts and frustrations begin to spill out as she inadvertently starts telling everyone what she really thinks.

programme.title: Borderlands
programme.desc: Returning to her home planet Pandora, an infamous bounty hunter forms an unexpected alliance with a ragtag team of misfits. Together, they battle alien monsters and dangerous bandits to uncover one of Pandora's most explosive secrets.

programme.title: Under the Boardwalk
programme.desc: Two crabs embark on an epic journey to get home after a storm sweeps them away. Their courage soon unites their families, paving the way for great summers to come.

programme.title: Book Club: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Four women take their book club to Italy for the fun girls' trip they never had. When things go off the rails and secrets are revealed, their relaxing vacation turns into a once-in-a-lifetime, cross-country adventure.

programme.title: Good Fortune
programme.desc: A well-meaning but inept angel named Gabriel meddles in the lives of a struggling gig worker and a wealthy venture capitalist.

programme.title: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple
programme.desc: Dr. Kelson makes a discovery that could change the world, while Spike's encounter with cult leader Jimmy Crystal becomes a nightmare he can't escape.

programme.title: The Black Phone
programme.desc: Finney Shaw is a shy but clever 13-year-old boy who's being held in a soundproof basement by a sadistic, masked killer. When a disconnected phone on the wall starts to ring, he soon discovers that he can hear the voices of the murderer's previous victims -- and they are dead set on making sure that what happened to them doesn't happen to Finney.

programme.title: Hey, Viktor!
programme.desc: Twenty-five long years after his time in the limelight, former child actor Cody Lightning tries to revive his fame with a self-produced sequel to "Smoke Signals.".

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Brent and the citizens of Dog River are annoyed when Lacey tries to make them eat local; Davis tries to train bees; Wanda sells homemade candles.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Wanda and Lacey entice the residents of Dog River with clickbait texts, while Oscar sets up a bait shop across the street from Corner Gas to teach Brent a business lesson; Davis and Karen involve Hank in a training exercise with chaotic results.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Rania's arrival triggers unwanted memories for Bash; Mags can't win her new boss' approval.

programme.title: H.appiness
programme.desc: An app designed to bring its users happiness helps a man build the perfect life, which he ends up destroying when he learns the app is faulty.

programme.title: Dress for Success
programme.desc: A refugee turned fashionista lawyer launches her own brand of designer philanthropy.

programme.title: Universal Language
programme.desc: Two women find frozen cash, try to retrieve it. A tour guide leads tourists around Winnipeg sites. A man quits his job and visits his mother.

programme.title: All Light, Everywhere
programme.desc: Filmmaker Theo Anthony offers a far-ranging look at the biases in how people see things, focusing on the recorded image.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.desc: When someone murders Capt. Frederick Burns, Aurora Teagarden must solve the case, despite never seeing eye to eye with the man.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: The largest police investigation of the decade lasted 23 days to catch a sniper who terrorized Washington, D. C. residents.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The team tries to end a standoff at a hospital between gang members and a man trying to protect his injured brother.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Friendly neighbors on a peaceful street have their lives disrupted when a developer moves in and builds houses nearby; tempers flare over the access road he uses for heavy equipment, which fuels escalating threats and confrontations.
